title: Rugma
subTitle: After Rugma's husband's untimely death, she struggles to raise her daughter as a single parent but does not get easily deterred by the challenges set before her.

title: Vasantha Sena
subTitle: Mahesh, a young man, falls in love with Meryln, a woman from an Anglo-Indian family. However, things become conmplicated when Shailaja, his sister, disapproves of their relationship.

title: Mr. Butler
subTitle: Gopalakrishnan, a chef, escapes from his village to a city when his marriage gets ruined. Later, he falls in love with Radhika, but his happiness is short-lived as his past returns to haunt him.

title: Doctor Live
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Vachanam
subTitle: When his friend goes missing, Gopan suspects that Vishnuji, a monastery head, is behind his disappearance. However, he is forced to take matters into his own hands when the courts set Vishnuji free.

title: Oru Mutham Mani Mutham
subTitle: Balachandran comes under family pressure and marries Lekha. However, when he chooses to not have children, chaos ensues within his family.

title: Vakkeel Vasudev
subTitle: While driving in an inebriated state, Vishnu hits a man and kills him. When he tries to help the victim's family, he falls in love with his daughter but hides from her that he has killed her father.

title: Nettippattam
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Mrugaya
subTitle: Varunni, a hunter, is summoned to help some villagers capture a man-eating leopard. When he accidentally kills a man, he decides to support the deceased's grieving family.

title: Chantha
subTitle: Sulthan, a labourer, tries to save his community from an evil bourgeoisie. He decides to take down their oppressors and help his people in leading a respectable life.

title: Ee Pattanathil Bhootham
subTitle: An evil magician releases a friendly spirit and orders him to make money through crime. However, the spirit falls into the hands of circus children after the sorcerer loses him in an accident.

title: Oru Ragam Pala Thalam
subTitle: Raju is a poor hard-working man who earns a living with great difficulty. However, when a rich industrialist offers him the job of being his personal secretary, his life changes.

title: Koodu Thedunna Parava
subTitle: Gopi, a pickpocket, comes across Savitri while trying to escape the police. However, days later, he is shocked to see her in a tight spot and tries to help her.

title: Ponmuttayidunna tharavu
subTitle: Bhaskaran, a goldsmith, is madly in love with Snehalatha, the daughter of astrologer, Panicker. When he asks for her hand in marriage, to his shock, she denies their love affair.

title: Doctor Live
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: C/O Saira Banu
subTitle: A hard-working postwoman lives a contended life with her adopted son. However, her simple life is jeopardised after her beloved son is imprisoned under a false charge.

title: Jallikattu
subTitle: Kalan Varkey, a butcher, faces a lot of trouble when a buffalo he was supposed to slaughter goes astray and causes chaos in a remote village.

title: Ganagandharvan
subTitle: Kalasadhan Ullas is an aspiring stage singer looking for his big break. However, his life is turned upside down when an opportunistic woman and her father target him for a nefarious purpose.

title: Collector
subTitle: District collector Avinash is hell-bent on banishing all the evil practices carried out by the local goons in Kochi. He is opposed by corrupt officials who support the illegal activities of the thugs.

title: Vellanakalude Nadu
subTitle: Pavithran, by hook or by crook, tries to become a successful contractor like his brother. However, he faces many challenges when he has to please an IAS officer, who is his ex-girlfriend.

title: Devasuram
subTitle: Neelakanthan squanders away the inheritance left by his father. However, his life turns upside down when his mother reveals a terrible secret on her deathbed that changes the course of his life.

title: Alakadalin Akkare
subTitle: Verendran, a smuggler, kills Mohan, a coast guard officer, only to discover that Mohan's father Balu is a witness. When Verendran sets out to kill Balu, his grandson Anand comes to his rescue.

title: Chiriyo Chiri
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of the funniest and most entertaining comedy scenes and videos from various famous Malayalam movies.

title: C.I.D Unnikrishnan B.A. Bed
subTitle: Trainee detectives Unnikrishnan, Prem and Ommen try their best to outdo each other and investigate a case in order to get employed at a private detective agency.

title: Doctor Live
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Varsham
subTitle: Venu, the owner of a small-scale finance firm, loses his son in an unfortunate incident. He gets involved in a lot of social work that soon leads him to become an obstacle in the way of his rivals.

title: Vishnulokam
subTitle: Circus performer Sankunni's heart is captured by village belle, Savithrikutty. However, this romantic pursuit is complicated by a rival's sinister intentions, testing Sankunni's resolve and talents.

title: Kanamarayathu
subTitle: Sherly, an orphan, falls in love with Roy not knowing that he is her financial supporter. However, Roy keeps his distance from her due to their age gap.

title: I. G. - Inspector General
subTitle: Inspector General Durga Prasad is promoted to head the anti-terrorism squad. However, things take a turn when he is forced to choose between his family and his job.

title: Lal Salam
subTitle: Nettoor Stephen, T K Antony and Sethulakshmi, three communist comrades, struggle to empower the labour class people. They get imprisoned when a landlord gets killed during an uprising.

title: Peruvannapurathe Visheshangal
subTitle: Kunjulakshmi, pampered by her brothers, is somewhat arrogant. When she falsely accuses Sivashankaran, a peon, of misbehaving with her, he decides to teach her a lesson.

title: Ambili
subTitle: Ambili, a naive and wide-eyed young man, is adored by everyone for his quirky traits. He hopes to marry his childhood love, Tina, and restore the lost bond with his friend and Tina's brother, Bobby.
